name: Aventurine • Waveflair
desc: The festival illuminates the shore, as storms brew within the Euphoria.\nSecret orders in hand, he steps back into the eye of the storm to shake up this long holiday—\nWhen the treacherous waves subsume him, how will he become the one that turns the tides?

1.name: Vacation At Stake
1.desc: Increases <u>All-Type RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Every time Aventurine • Waveflair gains <unbreak>10</unbreak> points of "Fervor," he can trigger his Talent to use "Cheers! To the Blazing Summer."

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

2.name: Tidal Fluctuations of Leisure
2.desc: Increases the max limit of "Fervor" to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points, and additionally grants <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor" after using Skill, Ultimate, or Elation Skill.

3.name: Chilled Afternoon Rendezvous
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: No Deals with the Sun
4.desc: DMG dealt by Aventurine • Waveflair ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy target's DEF.

5.name: Dive into the Jackpot Gale
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Cashing the Past for a Wild Ride
6.desc: <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt by Aventurine • Waveflair <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. After Aventurine • Waveflair uses his Ultimate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s), all subsequent Elation Skills used become "All in! To the Blazing Summer," and when using the Elation Skill "All in! To the Blazing Summer" to additionally deal DMG outside of Aha Instant, it no longer consumes "Fervor."

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

30000011.name: Merrymake
30000011.desc: A special effect that affects Elation DMG and can additionally boost Elation DMG dealt.

151301.name: Torrent, Bullseye Hit
151301.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine • Waveflair's ATK to one designated enemy.
151301.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated enemy.

151302.name: Fatal Shot, Boiling Sands
151302.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine • Waveflair's ATK to all enemies, and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> and <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor."
151302.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemies and gains <u>Punchline</u> and "Fervor."

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

151303.name: Winning Hand, Over the Tempest
151303.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine • Waveflair's ATK to all enemies, and gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> and <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor." Increases this unit's SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
151303.simple_desc: Deals massive Quantum DMG to all enemies, gains <u>Punchline</u> and "Fervor," and increases SPD.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

151304.name: Place Your Bets, Hear the Deep
151304.desc: The duration of Aventurine • Waveflair's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" increases by 1 turn. After a teammate uses an attack, Aventurine • Waveflair gains <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor" and <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline(s)</u>. The max limit for "Fervor" is <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> points.\nWhen "Fervor" reaches <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points, Aventurine • Waveflair uses "Cheers! To the Blazing Summer" 1 time, which takes a fixed <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u>(s) into account. After this use, the Elation Skill used by this unit in the next Aha Instant is enhanced into "All in! To the Blazing Summer."\nWhile Aventurine • Waveflair has "<u>Certified Banger</u>," his Skill additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies, and his Ultimate additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies.
151304.simple_desc: The duration of Aventurine • Waveflair's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" increases by 1 turn. After a teammate uses an attack, Aventurine • Waveflair gains "Fervor" and <u>Punchline</u>.\nWhen "Fervor" reaches a certain value, Aventurine • Waveflair immediately uses "Cheers! To the Blazing Summer" 1 time, with a fixed amount of <u>Punchline</u> taken into account, and enhances the Elation Skill used in the next Aha Instant to "All in! To the Blazing Summer."\nWhen Aventurine • Waveflair has "<u>Certified Banger</u>," his Skill and Ultimate additionally deal Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

151306.name: Attack
151306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

151307.name: Stirring Waves in Still Waters
151307.desc: Moves forward rapidly for a set distance, attacking all enemies in contact and blocking all incoming attacks. After entering combat via attacking enemies, Aventurine • Waveflair deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his ATK to all enemies, and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor" and <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>."
151307.simple_desc: Moves forward rapidly for a set distance and attacks enemies in contact. After entering combat by attacking enemies, deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies and gains "Fervor" and "<u>Certified Banger</u>."

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

151320.name: Cheers! To the Blazing Summer
151320.desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy.
151320.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies and additionally deals minor Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy, bouncing a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> times.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

151321.name: All in! To the Blazing Summer
151321.desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instances of DMG, with each instance dealing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy. Consumes all "Fervor" upon use. For every 1 point of "Fervor" consumed, additionally deals 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy.
151321.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies, and additionally deals minor Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy, bouncing a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> times. At the same time, consumes all "Fervor." For every 1 point of "Fervor" consumed, deals 1 instance of minor Quantum <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

1.point_desc: When SPD is <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or higher, increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> SPD exceeded, additionally increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. Up to a max of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.

At the start of the battle, if there are other Elation characters in the team besides Aventurine • Waveflair, Aventurine • Waveflair's Elation increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.\nAt the start of the battle, if Aventurine • Waveflair is the only Elation character in the team, after a teammate uses an attack, Aventurine • Waveflair gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline(s)</u>, and increases Aha's SPD by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. The SPD Boost effect lasts until the end of Aha Instant.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

1.point_desc: Increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After a teammate uses a Basic ATK, Skill, <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, or Ultimate, Aventurine • Waveflair's CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s), and he additionally gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Fervor." This effect can be triggered up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s), and the trigger count resets when Aventurine • Waveflair uses his Skill.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
